title: STOP Using Claude to Code. Do THIS Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese argues that Claude Code is not primarily a coding tool but a foundation for building personal AI operating systems that learn user workflows and compound in capability over time. He contrasts "renting" third-party AI with "owning" tailored AI systems, and outlines a framework of skill selection, automation, and scaling for both individuals and teams.
